projects.name: neruva-mcp
projects.summary: MCP server for Neruva agent memory + reasoning substrate (Python mirror of @neruva/mcp 0.23 on npm). Pair with neruva-record 0.16+ for warm daemon + TTL cache + reflect-cadence: cache-hit p95 ~80ms (faster than Mem0). AUTO-PILOT: agent_route_intent_prompt (18-pattern router) + agent_reflect_prompt (self-curation) + auto-extract on records_ingest. Plus Records, 5-engine KG, federated recall, Pearl do-operator, HD analogy, CBR, ToM, EFE, rule induction, replay, code_kg_*.

projects.name: neruva-record
projects.summary: Auto-record + auto-pilot for Claude Code, Cursor, and other agent harnesses backed by Neruva memory substrate. v0.15 ships a warm daemon with TTL cache: cache-hit p95 ~80ms (faster than Mem0). Pair with @neruva/mcp 0.23+ for the native Rust hook binary. AUTO-PILOT: KG auto-extract on ingest, 18-pattern intent router, reflective self-curation. Plus 8-language code-graph, per-turn recall, secrets redaction.
